entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A staple food crop studied for micronutrient improvement and yield.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of grain produced, a key agronomic trait for sorghum.

entities.name: GRAIN FE CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of iron in sorghum grains.

entities.name: GRAIN ZN CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of zinc in sorghum grains.

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days until 50% of the crop has flowered.

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the sorghum plant.

entities.name: 100 SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The combined weight of 100 sorghum seeds.

entities.name: GENE ACTION ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of how different alleles at a locus contribute to the phenotype.

entities.name: HETEROSIS ANALYSIS
entities.description: The evaluation of the superiority of hybrid offspring over their parents.

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: The assessment of the ability of parents to transmit traits to their offspring.

entities.name: LINE TESTER MATING DESIGN
entities.description: A breeding scheme used to evaluate combining ability by crossing lines with testers.

entities.name: SIMPLE SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method based on selecting individuals with desirable phenotypes.

entities.name: HETEROSIS BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding strategy aimed at exploiting heterosis to improve traits.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition resulting from a deficiency of essential micronutrients in the diet.

entities.name: BIO FORTIFIED SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum varieties bred to have increased concentrations of essential micronutrients.

entities.name: DOMINANCE VARIANCE
entities.description: Genetic variance resulting from the interaction of alleles at a single locus.

entities.name: ADDITIVE VARIANCE
entities.description: Genetic variance resulting from the additive effects of alleles.

entities.name: SCA
entities.description: Specific Combining Ability, the deviation of the hybrid performance from the expected average based on GCA.

entities.name: GCA
entities.description: General Combining Ability, the average performance of a parent in a series of crosses.

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: Genetic effects including dominance and epistasis that contribute to trait variation.

entities.name: MID-PARENT HETEROSIS
entities.description: The difference between the hybrid performance and the average performance of its parents.
